description_long: This church is a modest, rectangular building with a gabled, reddish-brown roof and beige walls. The front facade features a central double door flanked by three arched windows on each side, all with blue accents, and a triangular pediment above. The side walls each have a row of five evenly spaced arched windows, also with blue accents, providing symmetry and natural light. The structure sits on a raised stone platform with a paved area surrounding it, and the base is a polygonal section of green and gray terrain. The roof extends slightly beyond the walls, creating eaves, and the overall design is simple, with minimal ornamentation. There are no visible steeples, spires, or cross symbols, and the church lacks stained glass or a bell tower.
description: A simple, rectangular church with a reddish-brown gabled roof, beige walls, and blue-accented arched windows, set on a stone platform with a green and gray terrain base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, three arched windows on each side, and a triangular pediment above.
description_view_1: Side view displaying five evenly spaced arched windows and the full length of the gabled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back wall with no visible entrance, and the roof's overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with five arched windows and the extended roof.
